# Chapter 5: CAD and engineering drawing  (~110 pp)
- 5.1 Engineering drawing as communication (12) · 5.2 Tolerance: dimensional, geometric (GD&T) (20) · 5.3 Surface finish (10) · 5.4 Parametric CAD: features, constraints (18) · 5.5 Assembly and motion (15) · 5.6 PLM and BOM (12) · 5.7 Drawing for manufacture (15) · 5.8 Failure section: tolerance-stack errors, drawing ambiguity, unit-system clash (8)

**Archetype**: interface, failure. **Project**: produce a fully-detailed drawing pack for a small assembly. **Exercises**: 30.
